title: trisetum macilentum
intro: Trisetum macilentum, also known as the slender beard grass, is a species of grass within the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Trisetum macilentum include reducing inflammation, relieving fever, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Trisetum macilentum include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or ointments for topical application.
